Label: N/A
Issue: No specific safety requirements are detailed in Section 5.3
Correction: The system shall include a safety mechanism to ensure that in case of a system failure, critical functions like security and environmental controls are maintained.

Label: Section 4.4
Issue: Does not specify the response time for security breach detection
Correction: The system shall detect and respond to a security breach within 2 seconds of the contact sensor being set to OPEN.

Label: Section 4.5
Issue: Does not specify the maximum number of appliances that can be managed simultaneously
Correction: The system shall be able to manage up to 100 appliances simultaneously without performance degradation.

Label: Section 5.1
Issue: Does not specify total supported number of concurrent users
Correction: The system shall handle up to 10,000 concurrent users without performance degradation.

Label: Section 5.2
Issue: Does not specify the recovery time after a system failure
Correction: The system shall recover and restore data within 5 minutes after a failure.

Label: Section 5.4
Issue: Does not specify the encryption standard to be used
Correction: The system shall use AES-256 encryption for all data transmissions.

Label: Section 5.7
Issue: Does not specify the format of the user documentation
Correction: The user documentation shall be provided in both HTML and PDF formats.

Label: Section 3.4
Issue: Does not specify the power requirements for the DH Gateway Device
Correction: The DH Gateway Device shall operate on a standard 120V AC power supply.

Label: Section 4.1
Issue: Does not specify the maximum number of devices that can be controlled
Correction: The system shall be able to control up to 200 devices simultaneously.

Label: Section 4.2
Issue: Does not specify the accuracy of the temperature readings
Correction: The thermostat shall provide temperature readings with an accuracy of ±0.5°F.

Label: Section 4.3
Issue: Does not specify the accuracy of the humidity readings
Correction: The humidistat shall provide humidity readings with an accuracy of ±2%.

Label: Section 4.6
Issue: Does not specify the data retention period for reports
Correction: The system shall retain all planning and reporting data for a minimum of 5 years.
